ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the data source (e.g., Native, Wrapper, Base) */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* License associated with the data source */,
  "code_repo" TEXT /* Code repository URL for the data source */,
  "install_method_id" INTEGER /* Method used to install the data source (e.g., None, PGXN) */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Documentation URL or location for the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data source */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags to categorize the data source */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies required for the data source */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_install_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("install_method_id") REFERENCES install_methods ("install_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the type (e.g., database, file system) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* Icon URL for visual representation in the UI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full license text */,
  "is_open_source" INTEGER /* Indicates if the license is open-source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "install_methods" (
  "install_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each install method */,
  "install_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the install method (e.g., None, PGXN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the install method */,
  "script_url" TEXT /* URL to an installation script */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for installation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("install_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data architect, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data source */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for tracking the device and browser */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed action performed (e.g., view, download, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)
